---
title: "MATH 244: Paid vs. Unpaid Labor by Sex"
authors: "The West Coasters: Caitlin Gong, Meredith Hillier, & Leela Khatri"
---

Welcome! This is a template for creating a website using quarto and GitHub pages.

![](hedgehog.png){fig-align="center" width="603"}

[Artwork by \@allison_horst](https://twitter.com/allison_horst)
